calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR OSC
Off Calendar Jan-06-2023 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR OSC
Off Calendar Dec-02-2022 Continued To Jan-06-23 At 09:15 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for short cause trial/prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:41:58 a.m. and concluding at 10:24:10 a.m.

Plaintiff Irina Berdnik appearing represented by Sruli Yellin, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Mikhail Shapiro not appearing.

Court determines that Plaintiff seeks monetary danages in the sum of $50,469.07 as prayed in the complaint filed Apr-01-2020.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - E-mail from Dan Baum to Mikhail
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Purchase & Payments
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 3 - E-mail from Bank of America re: Mikhail Shapiro sent you $2,000.00
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 4 - Order Granting in Part and Denting in Part Motion for Default Judgment
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 5 - Retail Installment Sale Contract
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 6 - PDP Electronic Title Document
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 7 - ALLY - Account Payment Information for 2017 Jeep Cherokee
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 8 - CarFax History - Based Value

IRINA BERDNIK is examined by the Court.

Plaintiff's request for unpaid balance of 2017 Jeep Cherokee in the sum of $69,982.91 is DENIED.
Plaintiff's request for possession of 2017 Jeep Cherokee is DENIED. Plaintiff shall file a request to take custody of vehicle, prove it's paid off and demonstrate that the bank has released lien.

After review, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Irina Berdnik, and against Defendant Mikhail Shapiro, as follows:

Damages: $50,469.07

Plaintiff to file memorandum of costs and request to recover costs of suit.
Costs to be determined.

Proposed judgment with brief regrading Plaintiff's request for possession of 2017 Jeep Cherokee to be submitted within one week.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF IRINA BERDNIK's Anti-Slapp Motion.

Off calendar pursuant to dismissal filed July 6, 2020. Notice of stay b/c of bankruptcy proceedings, filed 7/28.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Abid Aziz (Abid@azizyellin.com) for Plaintiff.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF IRINA BERDNIK's DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT:

To the extent not mooted by the July 6, 2020 request for dismissal, cross-defendant Irina Berdnik's unopposed demurrer to the cross-complaint's two infliction of emotional distress causes of action is sustained without leave to amend.

order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF IRINA BERDNIK's DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT.

Plaintiff Irina Berdnik's demurrer to defendant's answer is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 430.41, which requires a pre-filing meet-and-confer "in person or by telephone." Counsel are ordered to promptly comply with the law.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR# 6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
